allow: Bash(node -e "const m=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''src/data/ruSearchMap.json'',''utf8''\)\); const bq=Object.entries\(m.byQuery\); const bi=new Set\(Object.keys\(m.byId\)\); let inBoth=0,onlyQ=0; for\(const [k] of bq\){if\(bi.has\(k\)\)inBoth++;else onlyQ++} console.log\(''byId:'',Object.keys\(m.byId\).length,''byQuery:'',bq.length,''overlap:'',inBoth,''onlyInQuery:'',onlyQ\)")

Bash(node -e "const m=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''src/data/ruSearchMap.json'',''utf8''\)\); const bi=new Set\(Object.keys\(m.byId\)\); for\(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(m.byQuery\)\){if\(!bi.has\(k\)\)console.log\(k,''→'',v\)}")

Bash(node -e 'const m=JSON.parse\(require\(""fs""\).readFileSync\(""src/data/ruSearchMap.json"",""utf8""\)\); const bi=new Set\(Object.keys\(m.byId\)\); for\(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(m.byQuery\)\){if\(!bi.has\(k\)\)console.log\(k,""→"",v\)}')
